Project.name: video-slide-md
Project.annotation: Automatically extract slide intervals from educational videos, link to SRT/VTT subtitles, and export Markdown presentations.
Project.keywords: video, slides, markdown, presentation, open-cv, computer-vision, slide-detection, subtitle-alignment, srt, vtt, marp

Actors.actor-User: Content creator with a lecture video and prepared SRT/VTT subtitles

UC-001.Action: Runs video-slide-md detect with video + subtitles
UC-001.Goal: Get slides.json with slide intervals, representative images, and aligned transcript
UC-001.AcceptanceCriteria: slides.json passes JSON schema validation, all slides have images, transcript is aligned

UC-002.Goal: Get deck.md — a Marp-formatted Markdown presentation
UC-002.AcceptanceCriteria: deck.md renders correctly in Marp-compatible viewer

UC-003.Goal: Get debug artifacts: diff_scores.csv, timeline.png, contact_sheet.jpg
UC-003.AcceptanceCriteria: Artifacts exist and contain correct data, timeline shows slide changes

NonGoals.item-1: No automatic speech recognition (ASR) in MVP — subtitles already prepared
NonGoals.item-2: No editable PPTX generation in MVP No OCR text extraction in MVP No LLM-based slide description in MVP No cloud/remote processing — local only No web UI with user management No automatic video download from YouTube/Zoom/Meet

Constraints.constraint-1: Must process video without loading entire file into memory (streaming)
Constraints.constraint-2: Must support Windows, Linux, macOS paths cross-platform
Constraints.constraint-3: Must support Cyrillic in paths and subtitle text
Constraints.constraint-4: Must not hard-depend on CUDA — CPU fallback required
Constraints.constraint-5: Slide detection is deterministic CV — no LLM for change detection
Constraints.constraint-6: Core processing must not be coupled to UI

Risks.risk-1: Low-quality or highly compressed video may cause false positives in slide detection
Risks.risk-2: Cyrillic subtitle encoding issues on some platforms
Risks.risk-3: GPU backend may not be available on all systems
Risks.risk-4: Animations and transitions between slides may cause split or missed segments
Risks.risk-5: Webcam overlay and UI elements may cause false slide splits

OpenQuestions.question-1: Should representative timestamp be configurable or fixed at 80% into segment?
OpenQuestions.question-2: Should multiple ignore_rois be specified as repeated --ignore-roi flags or comma-separated?
